message:
feat: add allowedHotkeys option and dashboard process view

- Add allowedHotkeys SDK option for granular hotkey control
  - Accepts array of action names like ['quit', 'copy']
  - When set, only specified hotkeys work; others disabled
  - Default (not set) enables all hotkeys as before

- Dashboard: full-screen process view with Ctrl+F filter
  - Click processes card to expand full screen
  - Left/Right arrows to change sort column
  - Up/Down arrows to select process
  - Ctrl+F to filter by name or port
  - Ctrl+K to kill selected process
  - Esc to return to main view
  - Bottom hints bar shows context-based shortcuts

- All packages use allowedHotkeys: ['quit'] by default
